summary: Good-quality capture of two Deer Creek shows with pleasant sound
review: The reviewer praises the tape for nicely capturing two great Deer Creek performances, noting that it sounds nice overall. While no specific technical details are given, the positive tone suggests a generally good listening experience despite limited information about source or mix.
